extract: Pidgeot (Japanese: ピジョット Pigeot) is a dual-type Normal/Flying Pokémon introduced in Generation I. It evolves from Pidgeotto starting at level 36. It is the final form of Pidgey. Pidgeot can Mega Evolve into Mega Pidgeot using the Pidgeotite. Mega Pidgeot was introduced in Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire.
